title: National Malaria Vaccination Drive
description: A nationwide initiative to provide free malaria vaccinations to children under 5. Conducted in partnership with MINSANTE and WHO.

title: Cholera Awareness & Water Purification Campaign
description: Educating communities on clean water practices and distributing water purification tablets in vulnerable districts.

title: Free HIV Testing & Counseling Week
description: Free, confidential HIV screening for adults aged 18+ at community centers across the West Region.

title: Humanitarian Health Response — Far North Region
description: Emergency health intervention covering maternal health, nutrition support, and community-based disease surveillance in refugee-affected areas.
